label: 第17話
source_locator: 単行本3巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: 東堂は伏黒に女性の好みを問い、回答が気に入らないとして一方的に攻撃する。真依も釘崎を痛めつけるが、東京校の二年生が介入して騒動を収める。
summary_full: 東堂葵は伏黒へ女性の好みを尋ね、その答えで人間性まで判断すると宣言する。伏黒が特定の外見ではなく、揺るがない人間性を持つ相手を尊敬すると答えると、東堂は退屈だとして突然攻撃する。伏黒は格上の東堂に対して十種影法術を使い、鵺と蝦蟇を組み合わせた不知井底で距離を取ろうとするが、身体能力の差で圧倒される。同時に真依は釘崎を銃で脅し、真希を禪院家の落ちこぼれと侮辱する。狗巻の呪言とパンダの介入によって東堂との戦闘は止まり、東堂は交流会へ乙骨を出すよう言い残す。釘崎のもとには真希が現れ、双子の姉妹が向き合う。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 葵 and 真依 from the rival Kyoto 呪術高専 arrive in 東京 to scout out the competition. When 葵 isn't impressed with 恵 's response of his type of women, he decides to aggressively test his strength. They get into a brawl while 真依 assaults 野薔薇 as well. The scuffle between schools is only broken up once the second-year 東京 students arrived to settle things.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 東堂葵, Kyoto third year, asks 恵 about his taste in women. 恵 replies by asking why he would share information about himself like that with a total stranger. 野薔薇 claims it's hard for 恵 to answer questions about girls and he tells her not to make the situation worse. 葵 introduces himself abruptly and claims that a person's taste says a lot about them. 葵 hates boring people and he wants his last Kyoto Goodwill Event to be against someone like that. " You're boring... 伏黒. " 恵 thinks of 津美紀 and reveals he has no preference. As long as the person is compassionate, 恵 doesn't need anything else. This answer amuses 野薔薇 and 真依, but 葵 isn't impressed and confirms for himself that 恵 is boring just as he thought. Sensing 葵's bloodlust, 恵 quickly tries to summon 鵺 but he's interrupted and slammed through the doorway by 葵. 野薔薇 tries to help but 真依 restrains her from helping. 真依 commends 恵 for being a grade 2 jujutsu sorcerer, but she still believes he's no match for 葵. 野薔薇 ignores her and tells 真依 that she isn't nearly as pretty as her sister 真希. Unamused, 真依 grabs 野薔薇 from behind and pulls out a gun. 葵 follows 恵 outside as the first-year is still recovering from the initial attack. The third-year claims he always knew 恵 was boring but wanted to give him a chance by asking. Now he feels that 恵 has trampled all over his kindness. 葵 outclasses 恵 in battle. 恵 recognizes 葵's name for being the famous grade 1 jujutsu sorcerer who defeated all of the curses who appeared on the night of " 新宿-to-Kyoto Night 線 of a Hundred Demons ". 恵 also heard that 葵 doesn't use his 術式 , but 葵 dispels that rumor and reveals he uses the technique on special grade curses. To better combat his senior, 恵 combines his 鵺 with 蝦蟇 to summon 不知井底 . He summons several winged toads and plans to nullify 葵's strengths by keeping his distance. 真依 appears to make short work of 野薔薇. However, 葵 uses his incredible speed to blitz through 恵's guard and German sup lexes him. 恵 quickly recovers but 葵 pins his head to a nearby wall and throws him up and through a platform above them. As 葵 jumps up to follow, he's caught by 恵's toad's tongues. He's unimpressed, but 恵 stands up with determination to make an impact. Two sisters turned bitter rivals reunite. Their duel is interrupted 狗巻棘 , who tells them to stop moving with his cursed speech . Then パンダ appears and punches 葵 with a hard right. パンダ asks why 葵 couldn't wait until the Kyoto Goodwill Event and tells him to leave immediately. 葵 agrees and decides that the event this year might not be boring after all. Before he leaves, 葵 tells his rivals to make sure 乙骨 to show up. Meanwhile, 野薔薇 is down with several wounds created by 真依's gun. 真依 tells 野薔薇 to watch who she picks fights with. A polearm knocks 真依's gun away from 野薔薇 and 真希 asks her sister what she's doing to the errand girl.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 釘崎野薔薇 伏黒恵 禪院真依 東堂葵 伏黒津美紀 (回想) 狗巻棘 パンダ 禪院真希
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 伏黒恵 vs. 東堂葵 釘崎野薔薇 vs. 禪院真依 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 不知井底 不知井底

key_events_verified_phase1: 東堂が女性の好みを理由に伏黒へ攻撃する
伏黒が不知井底を使う
真依が釘崎を銃で脅す
狗巻とパンダが戦闘を止める
真希が真依と向き合う
verification_notes: 話名・巻・開始ページは集英社公式。内容は原作漫画のみを扱う章別資料と旧候補を比較し、独自の日本語要約として再構成。原作ページを直接開いた最終照合は後工程。
